originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__irq_3` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&irq` is never used.
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_TWL4030_CORE () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_IRQ_DOMAIN () Bool
  true)
reasoning: 6252547b8a7.c L12: 'int irq = *ops;' — irq is assigned the dereferenced value of ops, but irq is NEVER subsequently used (function body ends at L13). This is a genuine dead store of irq. Note: the same line also has the known bug // (4) ERROR (null deref when ops=NULL from twl_probe), but the dead store of irq is a separate new bug. PC: (!TWL4030_CORE AND CONFIG_IRQ_DOMAIN) OR CONFIG_TWL4030_CORE = CONFIG_IRQ_DOMAIN (since TWL4030_CORE implies IRQ_DOMAIN). The function irq_domain_add exists whenever CONFIG_IRQ_DOMAIN is defined. PC correctly constrained. New bug.
